Apply for an Internship

Please apply by email to email …. with subject … Include the following information in the body of the email, and attach a CV:

  • Applicant name
  • Webpage or Google Scholar (if applicable)
  • Current education (e.g. MSc CS since 2023, 3rd year PhD since 2024, etc.)
  • University
  • Referees: advisor, and (optional) up to two other referees: name, email and relationship
  • What is your relevant experience, related to the 3 research areas above (and anything else you see as relevant)? (max 300 words)
  • What kind of research topics would you want to explore? This topic is not binding yet. (max 300 words)

The deadline for applications is ….
